svg.text: SOAR-Light C2C (Cloud-to-Cloud) — Complete Data Flow Walkthrough
Example: Account "2010205" creates Flow #43310 with SERVICE_LOG data type → Python script sends alerts to Jira
Reads full config from DB → Publishes to Dapr
FlowEvent JSON published to Dapr PubSub:
STAGE 2 — Config Delivery to soar-light Pod (via Dapr Sidecar)
Forwards to app via gRPC callback
For each data type in flow:
2. Decode base64 scripts → write to venv dir
STAGE 3 — Raw Data Ingestion (BloxOne → Kafka Raw Topics)
Parallel: Data flows independently of flow creation
Raw topics follow pattern: {accountId}_flowID{flowId}_{dataType} → e.g., "2010205_flowID43310_SERVICE_LOG". These are created when the flow is provisioned.
STAGE 4 — Kafka Flow Processor (Routes Raw → Destination Topics)
3. Lookup destination routing config for flow #43310
5. Produce to output topic via sarama.ProducerMessage
How Kafka Flow Processor knows to route to SOAR_LIGHT:
When flow #43310 was created (Stage 1), its destination config was stored with dest_name = "SOAR_LIGHT".
The processor fetches routing rules for all active flows from the flow API service. For flow 43310:
If the same flow also had a Splunk destination, it would ALSO route to: 2010205_43310_SPLUNK_SERVICE_LOG (fan-out)
STAGE 5 — Python Kafka Consumer (Data Arrives at SOAR-Light)
context.Auth1_Token → From flow context JSON (auth tokens)
All values were base64-decoded from the FlowConfig delivered in Stage 2
STAGE 6 — External Destination (User's Script Delivers Data)
COMPLETE C2C DATA JOURNEY — End-to-End Summary
User creates SOAR-Light flow via CSP Portal
REST API → cdc.flow.api.service → PostgreSQL + Dapr PubSub publish
FlowEvent delivered to soar-light pod via Dapr sidecar
Kafka topic "cdc-flow" → Dapr subscriber → ProcessEvent() → Creates Python venv + spawns process
BloxOne generates SERVICE_LOG events → Kafka raw topic
Topic: "2010205_flowID43310_SERVICE_LOG" — JSON events with DNS query data
Kafka Flow Processor routes to SOAR-Light destination topic
Python consumer reads from destination topic, executes user script
User's script sends alert to external system (Jira, Slack, PagerDuty, etc.)
context.Auth1_Token provides auth → requests.post() to external API → Incident created
REST JSON → Dapr FlowEvent (JSON) → Python CLI args → Kafka JSON msg → UTF-8 string → json.loads() → Python dict → HTTP POST
Key Identifiers for This Example Flow:
CDC SOAR-Light C2C Flow — Detailed Walkthrough with Example Flow #43310
